message:
perf(lto): improve native-static performance with CPU tuning

- Use apple-m2 CPU target for LLC on ARM Mac (matches WAMR AOT)
- Add +reserve-x18 feature flag (matches WAMR AOT)
- Remove noinline from hot path (LLVM already optimizes recursion to loop)
- Use native CPU for Zig compilation

Performance: Native-static ~2975ms vs WAMR AOT ~2770ms (7% gap, down from 8%)
